-- 3 of 8 --

A-List Copywriting Secrets 1.01
Lesson 2: What Makes Great Copy?
What makes great copy -- and how can you produce it? That’s what you’ll discover in this eye-
opening section …
• A simple checklist that tells you when you’ve written great copy.
• What your copy must do to get inside your reader’s head…and heart.
• The easiest way to make your claims instantly believable.
• How to use role-playing to make yourself a more persuasive writer.
• The mental picture you must create for your prospects to get instant enthusiasm. (Tony
Robbins is the king of this technique.)
• The 2 H’s that are criminally underestimated by most copywriters.
• Don’t embellish claims or make stories up -- do this instead!
• How trying to turn people away actually gets them to buy more.
• The “mom” secret for writing more believable copy.
• What you must confess to your prospect for the most persuasive copy possible.
(c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 8 --

A-List Copywriting Secrets 1.01
Lesson 2 Exercises
1. Pretend a parent or someone you care about desperately needs the product. Write a
simple, sincere one-page letter to persuade them to get it.
2. Identify the 3 big claims you can make.
(c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc.
1.
2.
3.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 8 --

A-List Copywriting Secrets 1.01
3. Add proof to support these claims. Now add MORE proof: use logic, common sense,
testimonials, media mentions, studies.
4. Write a description of how the product will in some way change the life of your
prospect.
(c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc.

2.
3.
